# Trilinear Composite Model

**Summary**: A modeling approach used to simulate production and evaluate the impact of various parameters on well performance.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-aleid|Aleid, 2018]] used trilinear composite model to model production for Wells A, B, and C.
